executives.name: Sanjay Mehrotra
executives.background: Sanjay Mehrotra is President and Chief Executive Officer at Micron Technology. He joined Micron in 2017 after a long career at SanDisk Corporation, which he co-founded and where he served as President and CEO from 2011 to 2016.

executives.name: Mark Murphy
executives.background: Mark Murphy is Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer. Before joining Micron in 2022, he served as CFO of Qorvo, Inc. and held senior financial positions at Delphi Automotive and Praxair.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Manish Bhatia
executives.background: Manish Bhatia is Executive Vice President, Global Operations. He joined Micron in 2017 from Western Digital Corporation, where he held various executive roles in operations and supply chain.

executives.name: Scott DeBoer
executives.background: Scott DeBoer is Executive Vice President, Technology and Products. He has been with Micron since 1995 and has led the company's technology development efforts since 2019.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, Technology and Products
Executive Vice President, Chief Technology and Products Officer

executives.name: Sumit Sadana
executives.background: Sumit Sadana is Executive Vice President and Chief Business Officer. He joined Micron in 2017 from SanDisk, where he was Executive Vice President and Chief Strategy Officer.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Business Officer

executives.name: April Arnzen
executives.background: April Arnzen is Executive Vice President and Chief People Officer. She has been with Micron since 1996, holding various leadership roles in Human Resources.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief People Officer
Various positions of increasing responsibility within Human Resources

executives.name: David Zinsner
executives.background: David A. Zinsner has been Intel’s Executive Vice President and CFO since January 2022. Before joining Intel, he was Executive Vice President and CFO at Micron Technology, Inc. from 2018 to 2022. He also served as President and COO of Affirmed Networks and held CFO roles at Analog Devices and Intersil Corp.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Linnie Haynesworth
executives.background: Ms. Haynesworth was a Sector Vice President and General Manager at Northrop Grumman Corporation.

executives.name: Lynn Dugle
executives.background: Ms. Dugle was the CEO and President of Engility Holdings, Inc. and held senior leadership positions at Raytheon Company.

executives.name: Mark Durcan
executives.background: Former CEO of Micron Technology, Inc. Director since 2017.

executives.name: Mary Pat McCarthy
executives.background: Ms. McCarthy was a Vice Chair at KPMG LLP and has extensive experience in audit and risk management.

executives.name: MaryAnn Wright
executives.background: Ms. Wright has served as a member of our Board since December 2021. She previously served as Group Vice President of Engineering and Product Development at Johnson Controls International plc.

executives.name: Mercedes Johnson
executives.background: Mercedes Johnson has been a director since 2014. She was formerly the Senior Vice President and CFO of Avago Technologies Limited and CFO of Lam Research Corporation.

executives.name: Richard Beyer
executives.background: Mr. Beyer was the Chairman and CEO of Freescale Semiconductor, Inc. and has held executive roles at Intersil Corporation and Elantec Semiconductor.

executives.name: Robert Bailey
executives.background: Mr. Bailey was the Chairman and CEO of PMC-Sierra, Inc. and served on the board of Entropic Communications.

executives.name: Robert Switz
executives.background: Former Chairman, President and CEO of ADC Telecommunications.

executives.name: Steven Gomo
executives.background: Steven Gomo has served as a director since March 2011. He was Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of NetApp, Inc. from 2002 to 2011. He also serves on the boards of Micron Technology and Nutanix.

executives.name: Wayne Allan
executives.background: Wayne Allan was appointed as Executive Vice President and Chief Strategic Sourcing & Procurement Officer in 2023. He joined ASML in 2018 and previously held senior management positions at Micron Technology.

board_of_directors.name: Robert Switz
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Switz has served as the Chairman of the Board since 2012. He was previously the President and CEO of ADC Telecommunications, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Sanjay Mehrotra
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Mehrotra is the President and CEO of Micron. He previously co-founded SanDisk Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Richard Beyer
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Beyer was the Chairman and CEO of Freescale Semiconductor, Inc. and has held executive roles at Intersil Corporation and Elantec Semiconductor.

board_of_directors.name: Lynn Dugle
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Dugle was the CEO and President of Engility Holdings, Inc. and held senior leadership positions at Raytheon Company.

board_of_directors.name: Steven Gomo
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Gomo was the Executive Vice President and CFO of NetApp, Inc. and held finance roles at Gemplus International and Silicon Graphics.

board_of_directors.name: Linnie Haynesworth
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Haynesworth was a Sector Vice President and General Manager at Northrop Grumman Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Mary Pat McCarthy
board_of_directors.background: Ms. McCarthy was a Vice Chair at KPMG LLP and has extensive experience in audit and risk management.

board_of_directors.name: Robert Bailey
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Bailey was the Chairman and CEO of PMC-Sierra, Inc. and served on the board of Entropic Communications.

board_of_directors.name: Mark Durcan
board_of_directors.background: Former CEO of Micron Technology, Inc. Director since 2017.

board_of_directors.name: MaryAnn Wright
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Wright has served as a member of our Board since December 2021. She previously served as Group Vice President of Engineering and Product Development at Johnson Controls International plc.

board_of_directors.name: Mercedes Johnson
board_of_directors.background: Mercedes Johnson has been a director since 2014. She was formerly the Senior Vice President and CFO of Avago Technologies Limited and CFO of Lam Research Corporation.
